2603.19615.title: CAF-Score: Calibrating CLAP with LALMs for Reference-free Audio Captioning Evaluation
2603.19615.paper_summary: While Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) have advanced audio captioning, robust evaluation remains difficult. Reference-based metrics are expensive and often fail to assess acoustic fidelity, while Contrastive Language-Audio Pretraining (CLAP)-based approaches frequently overlook syntactic errors and fine-grained details. We propose CAF-Score, a reference-free metric that calibrates CLAP's coarse-grained semantic alignment with the fine-grained comprehension and syntactic awareness of LALMs. By combining contrastive audio-text embeddings with LALM reasoning, CAF-Score effectively detects syntactic inconsistencies and subtle hallucinations. Experiments on the BRACE benchmark demonstrate that our approach achieves the highest correlation with human judgments, even outperforming reference-based baselines in challenging scenarios. These results highlight the efficacy of CAF-Score for reference-free audio captioning evaluation. Code and results are available at https://github.com/inseong00/CAF-Score.
2603.19615.paper_summary_zh: 雖然大型音頻語言模型（LALMs）已經推進了音頻標題生成，但穩健的評估仍然困難。基於參考的指標成本高昂，並且經常無法評估聲學真實性，而基於對比語言-音頻預訓練（CLAP）的方法經常忽視語法錯誤和細微的細節。我們提出了CAF-Score，一種無需參考的指標，該指標將CLAP的粗粒度語義對齊與LALMs的細粒度理解和語法意識進行校準。通過將對比音頻-文本嵌入與LALM推理相結合，CAF-Score有效地檢測語法不一致和微妙的幻覺。在BRACE基準上的實驗表明，我們的方法在與人類判斷的相關性上達到了最高，即使在具有挑戰性的情境中也超越了基於參考的基準。這些結果突顯了CAF-Score在無需參考的音頻標題生成評估中的有效性。代碼和結果可在 https://github.com/inseong00/CAF-Score 獲得。
2603.19615.author: Insung Lee et.al.
2603.19615.authors: Insung Lee, Taeyoung Jeong, Haejun Yoo, Du-Seong Chang, Myoung-Wan Koo
